title: Kyros Faces Diamante
description: Pages 3–7 focus on kyros faces diamante, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Sai, Unknown person #6 as kyros faces Diamante in the flower field, defending Rebecca and settling Dressrosa's deepest family wound.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You impudent brat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Announcement, management

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nico Robin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: saved by a hair's breadth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Don't you think your opponents handicap is a bit excessive, diameter?

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Handicap!? Oi ol, who the fuck ever said this duel was supposed to be fair and on the up and up?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This is an execution, plain and simple!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Plateau on which the Royal Palace is located - Level 3

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: And who the fuck are you < guys!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: GYAAH! Please, have mercy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Our job is but to carry away the remains of the defeated... please, leave us be!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: quite right. Although it sounds like to me you've got it all back- wards.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: soldier- San! You no longer need to worry about dis- traditions!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: I'll keep an eye on Rebecca now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Thank you! I am in our debt! I was at my limit... or at least my anger was!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It ain't even like this idiot is dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: While that may be true, it will probably take 2 or 3 days of medical attention...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Before he regains Conscio...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: BLAH, BLAH, BLAH! Just get 'em the hell outta here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: PURU RURU RURU

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Lady Viola! This is the factory team!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: What has become of Princess Mansherry!? And Leo and the others!?

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: I fear some terrible fate may have befallen our delicate, gentle princess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: about that... we may be in a bit of a bind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Wait a minute... stay on the line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Former Royal Plateau

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Leo! Can you hear me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Ah! Lady Viola!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We're currently climbing rampant tower!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: We should reach the Palace Chapel soon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Yes... I can see you! But you need to hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Mansherry has been cap- Tured by Giola and is being forced to use her power!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: WHAT?! No way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: That's not good at all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Below the Palace - Rampart Tower

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: stairs to the Palace

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: There they are! The dwarves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Bring the bombs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: We're taking the bullet train!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Princess Mansherry...We will be there shortly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Gya Aah!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: first floor of the palace, behind the chapel

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Timequit room

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Keep your ears peeled and listen to what I tell you-Zamasu!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Dwarf Princess!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Uuugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: I can't any more. Please, allow me to return to green bit.

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: tontatta tribe daughter of chief tonta (princess) MANSHELLY

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: There's nothing more I can do...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Shut your little mouth-Zamasu! You have some nerve call- ing me boa Hancock?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Quit playing cute! The time has finally come for you to make use of your power!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: The fools that fought with our executives may have won, but they're all gravely injured!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: Now! If we were to revive the executives with the power of your heal- heal fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Our enemies will be caught completely off-guard! They will have no choice but to lay down and accept death! The tide of the battle will turn immutably in our favor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Ohoho hoho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: You must once again use...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: The power that just revived sugar!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Bring out that watering can that special magic water of yours comes from! This instant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I... I've finally realized! You all...

dialogue.speaker: King Riku
dialogue.text: Are really bad people that are making trouble for King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: King Dofla- Mingo lied to me from the beginning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: And what of it!? You're at our mercy you rotten, little dwarf!

summary: Kyros Faces Diamante advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
